items.title: 3 Button Herald Power 31.8k
items.rotation: Make sure your facet of nature (F2 skill) is active. Opener is 2 sword 2s in Shiro and swap to Jalis. Rotation: Sword 2.
items.explanation: This is a beginner/low intensity revenant build for fractal/raid/strike content. Realistic == 10 boons. You have traits that scale with number of boons on you.

items.title: 3 Button Renegade Condi 30.4k
items.rotation: Spear 5. Swap legends as much as possible (your traits give conditions on legend swap). Mallyx elite in Mallyx. Opener is Spear 5 in Kalla, enter combat, swap to Mallyx and proc legend swap traits. Mallyx elite, etc.
items.explanation: This is a beginner/low intensity revenant build for fractal/raid/strike content.
